home.subtitle: Automatic WHOIS lookup, smart expiration reminders, all-in-one domain monitoring. Making domain management simple and elegant.
home.features_subtitle: Professional management tool built for domain investors and webmasters
home.feature1_desc: Automatically fetch registrar, registration date, and expiration info upon adding a domain.
home.feature2_desc: Continuous monitoring of domain status with automatic reminders before expiration.
home.feature3_desc: Centralized view of all your domains. Quickly grasp the status of every domain.
home.cta_desc: Sign up for free and experience smart domain management now

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.search_placeholder: Manage and monitor all your domains

add_domain_modal.title: Add New Domain
add_domain_modal.desc: Enter the domain names to manage (one per line). We'll automatically fetch their WHOIS information.
